typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ActionToPerform as string (),
	AWSScriptFile as string (),
	Count_Incorrect_Adj_Type_Cd as integer (),
	Count_Incorrect_Adj_Type_Cd_Teradata as string (),
	CreateLogFile as string (),
	EmailFrom as string (),
	EmailOnCall as string (),
	EmailTo as string (),
	Error_Ck as integer (),
	ESP_Event_Nm as string (),
	ESP_Job_Nm as string (),
	FileName_AllSales as string (),
	FileName_BSD as string (),
	FileName_CPD as string (),
	FileName_CPD_FIXED as string (),
	FileName_Duplicate as string (),
	FileName_FastLoad as string (),
	FileName_InvalidCustomerAdjts as string (),
	FileName_InvalidItems as string (),
	FileName_InvalidOrders as string (),
	FileName_InvalidRecords as string (),
	FileName_Loyalty as string (),
	FileName_Main as string (),
	FileName_ProgramAdj as string (),
	FilePath as string (),
	GlobalVarFile as string (),
	LoadMasterSnowSQLScriptName as string (),
	LoadStageSnowSQLScriptName as string (),
	LoadWorkSnowSQLScriptName as string (),
	MyDups as string (),
	S3_Command_Executable_Path as string (),
	SnowflakeConnectionName as string (),
	Snowflake_ODBC_Query_Schema_Name as string (),
	Snowflake_ODBC_Query_Table_Name as string (),
	SnowSQL_Command_Executable_Path as string (),
	SourceFileName as string (),
	SSISLogFileName as string (),
	SSISLogFolderPath as string (),
	SSISPackageFolder as string (),
	vFrznYear as string (),
	vSubjPage as string (),
	WorkTableRowCount as integer (),
	WorkTableRowCount_DataSet as string ()
}

source(output(
		Source as string,
		Adjustment_Type_Cd as string,
		Loc_ID as integer,
		BusinessDay_Dt as integer,
		BusinessUnit_CD as string,
		Sale_Type_CD as integer,
		ItemSku_Num as integer,
		Customer_Account_ID as integer,
		Order_ID as string,
		Sub_Order_ID as integer,
		FDay_ID as integer,
		Fyear_ID as integer,
		Sales as integer,
		Cost as integer,
		Program_USD_AMT as integer,
		Currency as string,
		Comments as string,
		Conv_Rebates_CustLvl_Adj as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT 	  Source 	, Adjustment_Type_Cd 	, Loc_ID 	, BusinessDay_Dt 	, Left(RTRIM(BusinessUnit_CD),2) AS BusinessUnit_CD 	, Sale_Type_CD 	, ItemSku_Num 	, Customer_Account_ID 	, Order_ID 	, Sub_Order_ID 	, FDay_ID 	, Fyear_ID 	, Sales 	, Cost 	, Program_USD_AMT 	, Comments 	, Currency               ,Conv_Rebates_CustLvl_Adj FROM Finance_Other_Adj_SalesType where  (Loc_ID is not null) and  (BusinessDay_Dt is not null) and  (BusinessUnit_CD is not null) and  (Sale_Type_CD is not null) and  (ItemSku_Num is not null) and  (Customer_Account_ID is not null) and  (Order_ID is not null) and  (Sub_Order_ID is not null) and  (FDay_ID is not null) and  (Fyear_ID is not null) and  (Sales is not null) and  (Cost is not null) and  (Program_USD_AMT is not null) and  (Comments is not null) and  (Currency is not null)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource derive(Comments = Comments) ~> DataConversion1
DataConversion1 sink(input(
		Loc_ID as string,
		Order_ID as string,
		Sale_Type_CD as string,
		Adjustment_Type_Cd as string,
		ItemSku_Num as string,
		Sub_Order_ID as string,
		Comments as string,
		FDay_ID as string,
		Conv_Rebates_CustLvl_Adj as string,
		Cost as string,
		Source as string,
		Program_USD_AMT as string,
		BusinessUnit_CD as string,
		Sales as string,
		BusinessDay_Dt as string,
		Customer_Account_ID as string,
		Currency as string,
		Fyear_ID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Loc_ID,
		Order_ID,
		Sale_Type_CD,
		Adjustment_Type_Cd,
		ItemSku_Num,
		Sub_Order_ID,
		Comments,
		FDay_ID,
		Conv_Rebates_CustLvl_Adj,
		Cost,
		Source,
		Program_USD_AMT,
		BusinessUnit_CD,
		Sales,
		BusinessDay_Dt,
		Customer_Account_ID,
		Currency,
		Fyear_ID)) ~> AllSalesADJUSTMENTS
